meta.description: AI-powered financial modeling for divorce settlements. See your 10-year financial future across every scenario.

hero.h1:
Know Exactly Where You Stand.
Before You Sign Anything.
hero.h2: Divorce settlement financial modeling for US, UK, Germany and more. See your 10-year financial future across every scenario — in minutes, not months.
hero.sub: 20 minutes. No credit card. Covers US, UK, Germany, France, Spain & Turkey.

fearHook.statLabel: average divorce legal fees in the US
fearHook.hook: How much of that comes from entering negotiations without a clear financial picture?

stats.label: to model your financial scenarios before meeting your attorney
compare house, alimony, and full settlement outcomes side by side
projected financial outlook so you can make informed decisions

fearHook.prepNote: Preparation tool — not a replacement for professional legal advice.

items.title: Every Scenario, Side by Side

items.title: Your Jurisdiction. Your Rules.
items.desc: California community property? UK Section 25? German Zugewinn? SettleLens knows the formulas.

items.title: A Report Your Lawyer Respects
items.desc: Professional PDF: asset breakdown, projection charts, negotiation strategy.

social.title: From People Who've Been Where You Are

quotes.text: I modeled my husband's offer in about 20 minutes. Turned out it looked good on paper but left me worse off by year 5. I renegotiated — and my attorney said I'd done half her work for her.
quotes.author: Sarah M., 42 · California · Married 14 years

quotes.text: The 10-year projection showed me that keeping the house would eat 60% of my take-home pay. I hadn't thought about it that way. I sold, invested the equity, and I'm genuinely better positioned now.
quotes.author: James T., 51 · London · Two children

quotes.text: I came in with a house simulator scenario printed out. My attorney looked at it and said 'this is exactly how I think about it.' Saved us probably two hours of billable time.
quotes.author: Michelle K., 38 · Texas · Business owner

disclaimer.full: SettleLens provides financial modeling for informational purposes only. Results are estimates based on publicly available legal formulas and do not constitute legal, tax, or financial advice. Always consult a qualified attorney before making any decisions.

userScenarios.title: What decision are you trying to make?
userScenarios.sub: SettleLens turns emotionally complex decisions into comparable financial scenarios.

cards.title: What happens if I keep the house?
cards.desc: Compare keeping, selling, or transferring the home — and see the long-term cash flow impact.

cards.title: Does this offer actually work for me?
cards.desc: Model the proposed split across assets, debts, and support payments to see 10-year financial outcomes.

cards.title: How do I prepare for my lawyer meeting?

trust.title: Built for One of Life's Most Sensitive Moments
trust.intro: During divorce, people must share the most personal financial data of their lives. SettleLens is designed to earn and keep that trust.
trust.s1_li1: Only what you enter: assets, debts, income, scenario data
trust.s2_p1: AI is a calculator, not a judge. It analyzes your scenario, generates projections, and flags risk factors. It does not make decisions, predict outcomes, or speak on your behalf.
trust.s2_p2: Your data is not stored at Anthropic and is not used for model training.
trust.s3_li2: Does not say "accept" or "reject" any offer
trust.s3_li4: Does not suggest hiding or transferring assets
trust.s3_li5: Does not say you don't need a lawyer
trust.s4_delete_link: Settings → Privacy → Delete Account (permanent within 30 days)
trust.s4_gdpr: GDPR and KVKK compliant by design.
trust.s5_p: Payments are processed by Paddle (Merchant of Record). Card details never reach SettleLens servers. Subscription management is handled in the Paddle portal.
trust.s6_highlight: SettleLens is designed so that no Anthropic employee, team member, or third party can access your financial data. Only you have access to your scenarios, assets, and reports.
trust.link: View our full privacy & trust page →
trust.s6_rls: Supabase Row Level Security: every query enforces auth.uid() = user_id.

countryCoverage.title: Built for your jurisdiction
countryCoverage.sub: SettleLens applies country-specific property regime assumptions for financial scenario modeling.
countryCoverage.note: Local judicial discretion, hidden assets, and complex agreements may produce different outcomes. Always verify with a qualified attorney.

attorneyPrep.title: Go into your lawyer meeting prepared
attorneyPrep.sub: Instead of scattered notes, bring a structured financial overview — assets, debts, income, children, and scenarios in one professional report.

houseDemo.title: The house is usually the biggest decision.
houseDemo.sub: See the financial difference between keeping, selling, or transferring it.
houseDemo.note: Simplified model — assumes {appreciation}% appreciation, {investmentReturn}% investment return, {saleCosts}% sale costs.
houseDemo.previewNote: This is a simplified preview. Full analysis uses AI and your jurisdiction's laws.

waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.

dashboard.readyDesc: Your financial data is entered. Select a scenario to run the AI-powered projection.
dashboard.upgradedTitle: Your plan has been upgraded successfully!
dashboard.upgradedDesc: Premium features are now active. Run your first AI analysis below.
dashboard.noScenariosDesc: Create your first scenario to compare settlement outcomes.
dashboard.discoveryUpgradeNote: Upgrade to see your 10-year AI projection across all settlement scenarios.
dashboard.evidenceOrganizerDesc: Your Professional plan includes the Evidence Organizer — a structured financial summary formatted for your legal team.
dashboard.yearsOfMarriage: {count, plural, one {# year of marriage} other {# years of marriage}}
dashboard.previewSubtitle: Unlock to see your 10-year financial projection for each scenario.
dashboard.faq_a1: SettleLens uses jurisdiction-specific assumptions and the financial data you entered. Hidden assets, judicial discretion, and complex agreements may alter real-world outcomes. Always verify with a qualified lawyer.
dashboard.faq_a2: Yes. Comparing 'I keep the house' vs. 'we sell' makes the 10-year financial gap concrete. Create at least 2–3 scenarios to see where the real differences lie.
dashboard.faq_a3: Yes. Each country uses its own inflation rate (e.g. US: 3.5%, UK: 4%, TR: 45%). You can set a custom rate per scenario using the inflation override field.
dashboard.faq_q4: Can I use SettleLens instead of a lawyer?
dashboard.faq_a4: No. SettleLens is financial modeling, not legal advice. It helps you arrive at attorney meetings better prepared — so you can ask sharper questions and make more informed decisions.
dashboard.faq_a5: Each user can only access their own data (Row Level Security). Your data is never logged to developer consoles or used for advertising. You can export or permanently delete all data at any time.
dashboard.faq_q6: What does the PDF report include?
dashboard.faq_a6: Asset inventory, debt table, 10-year projections, risk analysis, negotiation notes, and questions for your lawyer. Clarified plan: 1 PDF. Strategist/Professional: unlimited.

insight.compareScenarios: {best} projects {pct}% stronger net worth at Year 10 vs {worst}.
insight.negativeCashflow: Your scenario projects a monthly shortfall of {amount} — reviewing expense assumptions may help.
insight.highRisk: Your risk profile is elevated. Consider how alimony duration assumptions affect your long-term position.
insight.addSecondScenario: You have one scenario. Adding a second lets you compare settlement outcomes side by side.
insight.default: Your 10-year projection is ready. Review the chart below to compare outcomes.

scenario_offer.title: Analyze an Offer
scenario_offer.subtitle: Enter the terms of a settlement offer to see its projected 10-year financial impact.

scenario_offer.saveError: Could not save offer scenario. Please try again.
scenario_offer.assessment_favorable: This offer projects a stronger financial outcome than your baseline
scenario_offer.assessment_neutral: This offer projects a similar financial outcome to your baseline
scenario_offer.assessment_unfavorable: This offer projects a weaker financial outcome than your baseline
scenario_offer.pointsToDiscuss: Points you may want to discuss
scenario_offer.lawyerQuestions: Questions to raise with your attorney

scenario_detail.noAnalysisYet: No analysis yet for this scenario.
scenario_detail.discoveryUpgradeMsg: AI analysis requires a paid plan. Upgrade to see your 10-year projections.
scenario_detail.clarifiedRemaining: 1 AI analysis remaining on your Clarified plan.
scenario_detail.clarifiedUsed: You have used your 1 analysis. Upgrade to Strategist for unlimited analyses.
scenario_detail.notDecidedWarning: {count} asset(s) have no outcome set — default 50/50 split will be applied. Edit the scenario to set outcomes.
scenario_detail.missingFieldsWarning: This analysis used incomplete data ({fields}). Add missing information for a more accurate result.
scenario_detail.loadingHint: Analyzing with Claude AI — this takes about 10–15 seconds…
scenario_detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scenario and all its analyses?
scenario_detail.tipNetWorthNow: Your current net worth under this scenario: total assets minus total liabilities.
scenario_detail.tipYear1: Projected net worth after 1 year, accounting for alimony, child support, and asset changes.
scenario_detail.tipYear5: Projected net worth after 5 years with compounding effects of this scenario.
scenario_detail.tipYear10: Long-term projected net worth after 10 years — the most meaningful comparison metric.
scenario_detail.tipMonthlyCashFlow: Estimated monthly income minus expenses (mortgage, support payments, living costs) under this scenario.
scenario_detail.tipRiskScore: Financial vulnerability score from 1–10. Higher means greater uncertainty or pressure in this scenario.
scenario_detail.errorUpgrade: An active plan is required to run analysis. Please upgrade.
scenario_detail.errorLimitReached: You have used your analysis quota. Upgrade to Strategist for unlimited analyses.
scenario_detail.errorBusy: The server is busy. Please try again in a moment.
scenario_detail.errorTimeout: Analysis is taking too long. Please try again.
scenario_detail.errorNetwork: Please check your internet connection and try again.

step1.communityProperty: Community property state — assets acquired during marriage split 50/50.
step1.cataloniaNotice: Note: Catalonia, the Basque Country, and Aragon follow separate property regimes (not the standard Gananciales system). SettleLens applies general Spanish rules — please verify specific assumptions with a local lawyer.
step1.currencyNote: Currency: {currency} — applied automatically to all calculations.
step1.riskQuestion: Do any of these apply to your situation?
step1.riskNote: This helps us adjust our confidence level. It does not prevent you from continuing.
step1.riskNotice: This situation may require professional legal advice. SettleLens can help you organize financial scenarios, but please speak with a qualified lawyer or mediator before making any decisions.
step1.incognitoTip: For extra privacy, consider using a private or incognito browser window while entering your financial data.
step1.saveError: Could not save your information. Please try again.

step2.cryptoWarning: Crypto valuations are highly volatile. Professional appraisal is recommended for divorce proceedings.
step2.mortgageExceedsValue: Mortgage balance cannot exceed the asset value.
step2.saveError: Could not save your assets. Please try again.
step2.acquisitionYearHint: Year acquired — used for marital gain calculation
step2.contributionRatioHint: % of this asset you personally financed (default: 100%)

step3.hasDebts: Do you have any debts (other than mortgages already entered)?
step3.noDebts: No debts entered. Click Continue to proceed.
step3.saveError: Could not save your debts. Please try again.

step4.spouseUnknownNote: Spouse income will be marked as unknown. You can update this later. Projections will show an estimated range.
step4.netExceedsGross: Net income cannot exceed gross income.
step4.saveError: Could not save your income information. Please try again.

step5.hasChildren: Do you have any minor children (under 18)?
step5.noChildren: No children entered. Click Continue to proceed.
step5.childNote: Enter each child's age and expected custody arrangement. This helps model child support projections.
step5.custodyNote: Custody arrangements are assumptions for financial modeling only. Actual custody determinations are made by courts based on best interest of the child. Discuss custody with a qualified family law attorney.
step5.saveError: Could not save children information. Please try again.

step6.intro: Build up to 3 scenarios — compare different settlement assumptions side by side. Each scenario can have different house, alimony, and child support assumptions. You can edit these later from your dashboard.
step6.disclaimer: These scenarios are financial models based on your inputs. They are not legal advice, court predictions, or guaranteed outcomes. Consult a qualified family law attorney before making any decisions.
step6.saveError: Could not save scenario. Please try again.
step6.noPhysicalAssets: No real estate, vehicles, or businesses added yet. Asset outcomes can be configured after adding assets.
step6.investmentsHint: Applies to bank accounts, retirement, savings, investments, and crypto

houseSimulator.title: House Decision Simulator
houseSimulator.subtitle: The house is usually the biggest financial decision in a divorce. See the real numbers instantly.
houseSimulator.note: Assumes {appreciation}% annual appreciation, {investmentReturn}% investment return, {saleCosts}% sale costs.
houseSimulator.nominalWarning: ⚠️ Values are nominal (before inflation). Turkey's high inflation significantly affects real purchasing power — consult a financial advisor.
houseSimulator.fullPictureDesc: This simulator uses simplified assumptions. Your full analysis including debts, income, alimony, and 10-year projections requires your complete financial data.
houseSimulator.fullPictureFree: Free to start. No credit card required.
houseSimulator.disclaimer: This is a simplified model for illustrative purposes only. Actual outcomes depend on jurisdiction and legal agreements. Not legal or financial advice.
houseSimulator.affordabilityWarning: ⚠️ Monthly mortgage exceeds 43% of your income — lenders may not approve this
houseSimulator.scenarioNote: Note: This tool provides illustrative comparisons only. Results are estimates and may differ significantly based on local market conditions, location, and legal agreements.
houseSimulator.trustNote: Sign up for full AI analysis — includes jurisdiction-specific formulas and 10-year projections.

about.title: About SettleLens
about.story_p: A lens to see through the settlement fog. Divorce is one of life's most financially stressful events — and most people never see the real numbers.
about.mission_p: SettleLens's mission is to help people walk into lawyer meetings better prepared and to clarify their financial decisions. We don't replace a lawyer — we help you think more clearly before you see one.
about.responsibility_p: SettleLens provides financial modeling — not legal prediction. Outputs are estimates based on what you enter and do not represent definitive legal entitlements. Always consult a qualified attorney.

contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Your message has been received. We'll get back to you shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_p: SettleLens is a financial modeling tool for divorce settlements. Contact: support@settlelens.com · privacy@settlelens.com
privacy.s2_li2: Financial data: assets, debts, income (entered by you only)
privacy.s2_li4: Payment data: processed by Paddle, card details never reach SettleLens
privacy.s3_li1: Service delivery: scenario analysis, report generation
privacy.s4_p: Your financial scenarios are analyzed via Anthropic's Claude API. Your data is not stored at Anthropic and is not used for model training. Sensitive financial data is never logged to developer consoles.
privacy.s5_note: We never sell or transfer your data to third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy.s6_li1: Access: request a copy of your data
privacy.s6_li3: Erasure: delete your account and all data (permanent within 30 days)
privacy.s6_li4: Portability: download your data in JSON format
privacy.s7_p: Financial data is retained while your account is active. On account deletion, data is permanently deleted within 30 days. Audit logs are retained for 2 years for regulatory reasons (no personal data).
privacy.s8_p: Supabase Row Level Security: only you can access your own data. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Paddle manages payment security; SettleLens stores no card data.
privacy.s10_p: In the event of a data breach affecting your personal data, we will notify relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours as required by GDPR Article 33. If the breach is likely to result in a high risk to your rights and freedoms, we will inform affected users without undue delay as required by GDPR Article 34.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.intro: This page explains how SettleLens uses cookies. You can change your cookie preferences at any time.
cookie_policy.manage_p: You can update your preferences via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page, or by clearing 'sl_cookie_consent' from localStorage.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_p: By using SettleLens, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.s2_warning: IMPORTANT: SettleLens IS NOT LEGAL ADVICE. It provides financial modeling and scenario simulation only. Always consult a qualified attorney before making any decisions.
terms.s2_p: SettleLens enables users to build and compare financial scenarios based on data they enter. Results are estimates and do not determine legal entitlements.
terms.s3_li1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
terms.s3_li2: You must not share your account with others.
terms.s3_li3: Users must be 18 years or older.
terms.s4_p: Payments are processed by Paddle, who acts as Merchant of Record. For billing issues, contact Paddle support.
terms.s5_li1: Monthly subscriptions (Strategist / Professional) can be cancelled anytime.
terms.s5_li2: After cancellation, access continues until the end of the current period.
terms.s5_li3: Clarified (one-time): refund may be requested within 7 days.
terms.s6_p: You may not use the service for illegal purposes, with others' data without consent, or to abuse the system.
terms.s7_p: The SettleLens platform and content are copyright protected. Data you enter remains yours.
terms.s8_p: The service is provided 'as is'. No warranty of accuracy, completeness, or fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.s9_p: SettleLens liability is limited to the monthly fee you paid. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.s10_p: These terms are governed by Turkish law. Disputes shall be resolved in Istanbul courts.
terms.s11_p: We may update these terms. Material changes will be notified by email.
